title: stelis thymochila
intro: Stelis thymochila is a species of orchid, belonging to the genus Stelis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and fever, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Stelis thymochila include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and aid in the recovery from infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Stelis thymochila is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
